msg: No tuning artifacts found for cuda/matmul_f16fp32_16416x16416x16416
PLANNED iter002_reduced_regs: Reduce register pressure: smaller WM/WN tiles (32x32 per warp), maxrregcount=128 to cap registers, increase occupancy from 12.5% to ~25%
PLANNED iter003_async_pipeline: Add async memory pipelining with cp.async.bulk and double-buffered shared memory to hide L2/DRAM latency. Keep original tile sizes but overlap loads with compute.
PLANNED iter004_vectorized_load: Use vectorized 128-bit loads (half8/float4 equiv) for memory coalescing, larger BK=64 for better arithmetic intensity, original tile sizes for compute
PLANNED iter005_swizzle_smem: Add swizzled shared memory layout to eliminate bank conflicts during WMMA loads. Keep vectorized global loads from iter004.
PLANNED iter006_larger_tiles: Increase tile sizes to BM256 BN128 for higher arithmetic intensity. More compute per memory access to amortize latency.
PLANNED iter007_ptx_mma: Replace WMMA API with raw PTX ldmatrix+mma.sync.m16n8k16 instructions for lower overhead. Use iter004 tile sizes.
PLANNED iter008_bk128: Double BK from 64 to 128 for more WMMA iterations per syncthreads, reducing sync overhead. Keep BM/BN at 128.
PLANNED iter009_warp_1x8: Change warp topology from 4x2 to 1x8 warps. Each warp computes full 128-wide row slice of output. Better L2 locality for B matrix loads.
PLANNED iter010_launch_bounds: Add __launch_bounds__(256, 2) to target 2 blocks per SM for better latency hiding. Reduce smem padding from +8 to +4.
PLANNED iter011_small_tiles: Try smaller BM64 BN64 tiles with 2x2 warp layout for higher occupancy due to less smem per block. Keep BK64 and vectorized loads.
PLANNED iter012_unroll_k: Unroll K-loop by 2x with manual prefetch hint. Load next tile while computing current. Based on iter004.
PLANNED iter013_double_buffer_async: Double-buffer with cp.async - load next while computing current, no helper functions
PLANNED iter014_swizzle_smem: XOR swizzle pattern for shared memory to eliminate 5-way bank conflicts
PLANNED iter015_larger_bm_256: BM=256 BN=64 BK=32 with 8x1 warps - larger M tile for better A matrix reuse
PLANNED iter016_three_stage_bk48: 3-stage pipeline with BK=48 - deeper pipeline for more latency hiding
PLANNED iter017_wider_padding: Increase shared memory padding to +16 to reduce bank conflicts
PLANNED iter018_more_wmma_tiles: Increase per-warp WMMA tiles from 2x4 to 4x4 for higher compute intensity
PLANNED iter019_b_col_major: Use col_major layout for B in shared memory for better WMMA access pattern
PLANNED iter020_extended_smem: Use 100KB extended shared memory with BK=64 for more compute per sync
Baseline SASS extracted via ncu (1290 lines)
Custom SASS extracted for iter013_double_buffer_async (1952 lines)
SASS comparison complete for iter013_double_buffer_async (saved to tuning/sm90_NVIDIA_H800_PCIe/cuda/perf/matmul_f16fp32_16416x16416x16416/opus-4/sass_compare_iter013_double_buffer_async.json)
PLANNED iter021_fewer_syncs: Reduce barrier density by removing extra __syncthreads, SASS shows 12x more syncs than baseline
PLANNED iter022_double_buf_bk48: Double buffer with BK=48 - balance between compute and memory footprint
PLANNED iter023_persistent_cta: Persistent CTA: each block processes multiple output tiles sequentially
PLANNED iter024_register_blocking: Single buffer with BK=64, load A once and reuse for all B fragments to reduce smem access
PLANNED iter025_smaller_tiles_occ: BM=64 BN=128 to increase occupancy from 25% toward 50%
PLANNED iter026_bm96_bn96: BM=96 BN=96 with 3x2 warps (192 threads) for different tile aspect ratio
PLANNED iter027_bm256_single: BM=256 BN=64 single buffer - maximize A matrix reuse with larger M tile
PLANNED iter028_double_buf_bk64_ext: Double buffer BK=64 with 100KB extended smem - proper cudaFuncSetAttribute
PLANNED iter029_no_extra_sync: Remove extra syncthreads in K-loop - rely on cp.async wait only
PLANNED iter030_warp4x2_layout: Change warp layout from 4x1 to 4x2 = 256 threads, each warp processes 16x32 output
PLANNED iter031_wider_bn_256: Increase BN from 128 to 256 for higher arithmetic intensity, use 4x4 warp layout with BK=16
PLANNED iter032_split_k: Split-K parallelism - divide K among multiple blocks, atomic add partial results
PLANNED iter033_tighter_loop: Unroll inner K loop completely to reduce loop overhead and improve ILP
PLANNED iter034_unroll8: Increase unroll factor to 8 for even better ILP
PLANNED iter035_unroll2: Try unroll 2 as a lighter alternative to unroll 4
PLANNED iter036_prefetch_hint: Add L2 prefetch hints for upcoming K tiles to improve cache hit
PLANNED iter037_remove_bound: Remove __launch_bounds__ to let compiler optimize register allocation
PLANNED iter038_bound_3: Increase minBlocksPerMultiprocessor from 2 to 3 for better occupancy
PLANNED iter039_bk24_3stage: 3-stage pipeline with BK=24 to reduce shared mem and improve latency hiding
PLANNED iter040_bk16_3stage: 3-stage pipeline with BK=16 to reduce shared mem and improve latency hiding
PLANNED iter041_stream_k: Stream-K scheduling - each CTA processes partial K slices for better load balancing
PLANNED iter042_vectorized_out: Use vectorized float4 stores for output matrix C
PLANNED iter043_unroll6: Try unroll factor 6 between 4 and 8
PLANNED iter044_unroll3: Try unroll factor 3 between 2 and 4
PLANNED iter045_less_padding: Reduce shared memory padding from +8 to +4 to fit more in cache
PLANNED iter046_bk48: Increase BK from 32 to 48 for better K-dimension coverage
PLANNED iter047_bound1: Try minBlocksPerMultiprocessor=1 to allow more registers per thread
PLANNED iter048_restrict_ptr: Ensure all pointers use __restrict__ for compiler optimization hints
PLANNED iter049_smaller_warp_tile: Use 1 WMMA tile per warp instead of 2x4 to reduce register pressure
PLANNED iter050_sm_carveout: Use cudaFuncSetSharedMemConfig for larger L1 cache carveout
PLANNED iter051_no_outer_unroll: Remove pragma unroll 4 from outer K loop to reduce register pressure
PLANNED iter052_mma_m16n8k16: Use PTX mma.m16n8k16 instead of WMMA 16x16x16 for better SM90 efficiency
PLANNED iter053_smaller_tile: Use BM=64 BN=64 with 2x2 warps to reduce register pressure and improve occupancy
PLANNED iter054_square_128: Use square 128x128 tiles with 2x2 warp layout (4 warps) for balanced compute
PLANNED iter057_inline_all: Force inline cp_async helpers
PLANNED iter101_bn64_warps: BM=128 BN=64 with 4x1 warps to reduce B matrix footprint
PLANNED iter102_wgmma_ptx: Use SM90 wgmma PTX instructions instead of WMMA
PLANNED iter103_bk64_single: Single buffer BK=64 with unroll 4 - simpler pipeline
PLANNED iter104_cluster: Use SM90 thread block clusters for better L2 locality
PLANNED iter105_pad16: Increase smem padding to +16 to eliminate bank conflicts
